name: Starlight Tartare
description: Finely diced seasonal tuna with yuzu, avocado, and a touch of edible gold.

name: Solar Citrus Elixir
description: Fresh-squeezed blood orange, yuzu, and sparkling mineral water with a lemon twist.

name: Solar Flare Spritz
description: Blood orange aperitif, prosecco, and a splash of sparkling water with a citrus twist.

name: Stardust Chocolate Sphere
description: Dark chocolate sphere filled with passionfruit mousse and a cosmic reveal.

name: Galactic Sea Bass
description: Pan-seared sea bass with a star anise glaze, served atop smoked leek purée.

name: Nebula Carpaccio
description: Paper-thin slices of beetroot and radish, finished with truffle vinaigrette.

name: Moonflower Iced Tea
description: Delicate jasmine tea with white peach and a hint of elderflower, lightly chilled.

name: Nebula Negroni
description: Gin, sweet vermouth, and house-infused hibiscus Campari, served with an ice sphere.

name: Aurora Meringue Cloud
description: Light, airy meringue with lavender cream, freeze-dried berries, and golden syrup.

name: Nebula Lamb Loin
description: Herb-crusted lamb loin with rich black garlic jus, served with moonlit potato gratin.

name: Lunar Croquettes
description: Crispy potato and fontina bites served with smoked saffron aioli.

name: Stardew Botanical Tonic
description: House-infused rosemary, cucumber, and lime with artisanal tonic water.

name: Midnight Orbit Martini
description: Vodka, elderflower liqueur, fresh lemon, and a shimmer of edible silver dust.

name: Comet Lemon Tart
description: Tangy lemon curd on a crisp almond crust, topped with candied citrus peel and star sugar.

name: Cosmic Mushroom Risotto
description: Creamy arborio rice with wild forest mushrooms, parmesan dust, and truffle oil.

name: Celestial Garden Plate
description: Roasted seasonal vegetables with comet herb oil and a sprinkle of toasted seeds.

name: Nebula Cold Brew
description: Smooth single-origin cold brew with vanilla bean and a touch of oat milk.

name: Eclipse Old Fashioned
description: Small-batch bourbon, smoked star anise syrup, orange bitters, and a flamed citrus peel.

name: Moonlit Panna Cotta
description: Silky vanilla panna cotta with blackberry nebula compote and a sprinkle of silver dust.

name: Solar Flare Duck Breast
description: Crispy-skinned duck with blood orange gastrique, served with celestial spiced lentils.
